# testdata

Fixtures generated by `cmd/genfixture`. Run `make fixtures` to regenerate.

## Provenance

All fixtures are hand-crafted from scratch using only Go stdlib and
`golang.org/x/crypto`. Apache 2.0 clean; no third-party cert data
vendored. Regeneration is deterministic byte-for-byte: fixed seeds for
Ed25519 key material, fixed validity dates (2026-01-01 to
2027-01-01 UTC).

## Contents

- `valid/mtc_minimal.pem`: minimal MTC-shaped cert. Outer signature
  algorithm is the experimental draft-02 OID `1.3.6.1.4.1.44363.47.0`.
  The signatureValue BIT STRING contains a 20-byte minimal MTCProof
  (start=0, end=1, empty inclusion_proof, empty signatures).
- `invalid/ed25519_cert.pem`: self-signed Ed25519 cert (OID `1.3.101.112`).
  R001 classifies it as NA in default mode and Error in strict mode
  because the signature OID is not the MTC OID. Ed25519 is used instead
  of RSA so regeneration stays deterministic on Go 1.26+, where
  `crypto/rsa.GenerateKey` bypasses caller-supplied randomness for FIPS
  140-3 blinding.
